Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 28 

DED_GENERIC_COPAY 

LABEL: Part D Co-Payment Amount for Generic Drugs in Deductible 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of Part D beneficiary co-payment charged for generic drugs in the 
deductible phase by the plan. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DED_GENERIC_COPAY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The width of this value
